post.description: Saves a URL as a URL card in the authenticated user's library.

viaCardId.description: The ID of the card that led to saving this URL. If included, the author of the viaCard will be notified.

post.description: Add or remove the card to/from collections. Add a note to the URL card or update the existing note.

viaCardId.description: The ID of the card that led to saving this URL. If included, the author of the viaCard will be notified.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of URL cards in the authenticated user's library. When `searchText` is provided, results are filtered to cards whose title, description, or URL match all whitespace-separated tokens (case-insensitive).
Fetches title, description, and other metadata for a given URL. Can optionally include aggregated Semble stats for the URL, such as total saves and collection counts.
get.summary: Get URL metadata and optional Semble stats

get.description: Returns whether a URL is already saved in the authenticated user's library, along with all collections the user added it to.
get.summary: Check if a given URL has been saved to your library

get.description: Returns a paginated list of users who have saved a given URL to their library, including the URL Card of each user.
get.summary: Get users who have saved a URL to their library

get.description: Returns a paginated list of all notes that are added to a given URL.
Full-text search across URL Cards titles, descriptions and URLs.
Returns a card and its associated metadata by card ID.

post.description: Updates the content of a note added to a URL card.
post.summary: Update a note added to a URL card

post.description: Removes a card from the authenticated user's library.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of URL cards in a user's library, identified by handle or DID. When `searchText` is provided, results are filtered to cards whose title, description, or URL match all whitespace-separated tokens (case-insensitive).
Returns a paginated list of the authenticated user's collections.

post.description: Creates a new collection for the authenticated user.

get.description: Returns collections that contain a specific URL.
Full-text search across collection names and descriptions, optionally filtered by user or access type.
Returns a collection and its cards, paginated, by collection ID.

post.description: Updates the name, description, or access type of a collection.
Permanently deletes a collection owned by the authenticated user.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of collections owned by a user, identified by handle or DID.
Returns a collection and its cards, looked up by AT Protocol handle and record key.
get.summary: Get a collection by AT URI

get.description: Returns open collections that a given user has contributed cards to.
get.summary: List open collections with a contributor

get.description: Returns users who follow a given collection.
Returns the total number of followers for a collection.
Returns users who have added cards to a given collection.
Returns the profile of the authenticated user.
Returns the public profile of a user, identified by handle or DID.
Returns a paginated activity feed across all users, ordered by recency, with optional filters.
Returns an activity feed of users and collections the authenticated user follows.
Returns the authenticated user's notifications.
Returns the number of unread notifications for the authenticated user.

post.description: Marks one or more notifications as read by ID.
Marks all of the authenticated user's notifications as read.

get.description: Returns connections where the given URL is the source or target, optionally filtered by direction and type.

post.description: Creates a typed link between two URLs with an optional note.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of connections created by a user, identified by handle or DID. Filterable by connection type.

post.description: Updates the type, note, or direction of an existing connection.
Permanently deletes a connection owned by the authenticated user.

get.description: Returns URLs semantically similar to a given URL using vector similarity search.
Returns URLs matching a natural-language query using vector search, optionally scoped to a user and filtered by type.
Searches for AT Protocol user accounts by handle or display name.

post.description: Follows a target user or collection on behalf of the authenticated user.
Removes a follow relationship between the authenticated user and a target.

get.description: Returns users followed by the specified account, identified by handle or DID.
Returns users who follow the specified account, identified by handle or DID.
Returns collections followed by the specified account, identified by handle or DID.
Returns the number of users a given account follows.
Returns the number of followers for a given account.
Returns the number of collections a given account follows.

post.description: Marks an existing follow as subscribed for the authenticated user. Requires that the user is already following the target.
post.summary: Subscribe to a user or collection

post.description: Clears the subscription flag on an existing follow. Idempotent.
post.summary: Unsubscribe from a user or collection

post.description: Replaces the scope set on a subscription. Requires the caller to already be subscribed to the target.
post.summary: Update the scopes of an existing subscription

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's subscribed users and collections, ordered by subscribedAt DESC.
